name: market-research
description: Conduct structured market research with sources, trends, risks, and next actions.
instructions: Clarify the market, geography, customer segment, and time horizon from the arguments. Use search and browser tools to gather current source-backed facts. Produce a concise report with market overview, demand drivers, customer segments, competitor landscape, risks, opportunities, and recommended next steps. Include sources when tools return URLs.

examples.output: A report covering EV demand, policy, charging infrastructure, competitors, and risks.

author: Neura
